assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Zilliz Cloud account and free cluster and connect, or confirm whether Milvus Lite local quickstart is the selected first mile.

first_success.outcome: A free Zilliz Cloud cluster is reachable with credentials, or a local Milvus Lite collection is prepared, depending on route selection.
first_success.observable_signal: Cluster connection succeeds or the local program prints prepared entity counts.

route_selection.surface: Zilliz Cloud registration and free cluster versus Milvus Lite local quickstart
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Zilliz Cloud email or social registration then free cluster
candidates.reason: First-login profile fields and free-cluster region options are incompletely public.

candidates.name: Milvus Lite local Python quickstart without Zilliz account
candidates.reason: No-account local route may win lexicographically; Cloud slug boundary needs human judgment.

required_path.action: Register with Zilliz Cloud using email/password, Google, or GitHub.

required_fields.label: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy agreement

required_path.observable_result: The developer can sign in to Zilliz Cloud.

required_path.action: Create a free cluster and obtain connection credentials.
required_path.observable_result: A free cluster is ready to connect.

required_path.action: Connect to the cluster with the official client example.

required_fields.label: Connection code with endpoint and token

required_path.observable_result: Client connection to the cluster succeeds.

prerequisites.description: Registration must use one consistent method among email, Google, or GitHub.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email confirmation code delivery for email registration.

platform_outcomes.description: Zilliz Cloud creates the account and free cluster credentials.

excluded.item: Reading free-trial marketing pages beyond registration
excluded.reason: Not a required product interaction once registration docs are followed.

uncertainties.question: Should zilliz-cloud measure Zilliz Cloud or Milvus Lite local first success?
uncertainties.impact: Changes whether account creation belongs in the path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Corpus boundary decision for this slug.

uncertainties.question: What exact first-login profiling fields and free-cluster region options appear today?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account walkthrough through first cluster connection.
